summary: Bug fix VERIFIED: Presentation Mode now correctly shows 'SIGUIENTE GIRO' button after non-winner spins. Tested full 3-spin flow - button appears after spin 1 and spin 2, confetti celebration on final spin winner.

issues: Giro counter shows 'Giro 4 de 3' when spins exceed total (edge case from previous incomplete tests) - not critical, cosmetic only

passed_tests: Presentation Mode: 'GIRAR' button visible on initial load
Presentation Mode: First spin shows result with 'No es el ganador' / '¡Sigue girando!'
Presentation Mode: 'SIGUIENTE GIRO' button appears after non-winner spin 1
Presentation Mode: Click 'SIGUIENTE GIRO' triggers spin 2
Presentation Mode: 'SIGUIENTE GIRO' button appears after non-winner spin 2
Presentation Mode: Final spin shows '¡GANADOR!' with confetti animation
Presentation Mode: Winner display has golden styling and celebration effects
Presentation Mode: 'Cerrar presentación' button shows after winner reveal
Normal Mode: Spin dialog opens correctly
Normal Mode: Spin counter shows 'Giro X de Y'
Normal Mode: Non-winner shows 'No es el ganador' message
Normal Mode: 'Girar (X restantes)' button works for subsequent spins
Backend: POST /api/raffles/{id}/spin returns is_final_spin=false for spins 1-2
Backend: POST /api/raffles/{id}/spin returns is_final_spin=true on spin 3
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix in SpinningWheelPresentation.js (lines 436-446) correctly shows 'SIGUIENTE GIRO' button when phase='result' and !isWinnerSpin
handleNextSpin callback properly resets state and triggers onStartSpin after delay
SPACE key handler also works for 'next spin' when in result phase
seed_data_creation: Used existing test raffles (Test Spin Raffle, Preselect Test Raffle) with sold tickets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Presentation Mode bug is fixed. The 'SIGUIENTE GIRO' button now correctly appears after each non-winner spin. Full flow verified: Spin 1 -> SIGUIENTE GIRO button -> Spin 2 -> SIGUIENTE GIRO button -> Spin 3 (Final) -> ¡GANADOR! with confetti. Normal mode dialog also tested and working.

bug_fix_verified.issue: After first spin in Presentation Mode, NO button appeared to continue spinning
bug_fix_verified.verification: Button 'SIGUIENTE GIRO' now appears after each non-winner spin result
